title: Baliuag Heavy Rain
lead: Baliuag is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.14, indicating a significant anomaly. The Score of 10.0/10 and CRITICAL Level suggest severe weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Baliuag is causing disruptions in daily life. 
 The high Umidita of 89% and low Vento of 2.8 km/h are contributing to the severe weather. 
 The CDD of 10.0 GG and HDD of 0.0 GG indicate a high energy demand due to the weather conditions.
